children.heading: No entitlement to contract or grant
children.label: a No entitlement to contract or grant

children.text: to entitle any child care provider or recipient of a child care certificate to any contract, grant or benefit; or
to limit the right of any State to impose additional limitations or conditions on contracts or grants funded under this subchapter.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided for in , no funds made available under this subchapter shall be expended for the purchase or improvement of land, or for the purchase, construction, or permanent improvement (other than minor remodeling) of any building or facility.section 9858m(c)(6) of this title

children.heading: Sectarian agency or organization
children.label: 2 Sectarian agency or organization
children.text: In the case of a sectarian agency or organization, no funds made available under this subchapter may be used for the purposes described in paragraph (1) except to the extent that renovation or repair is necessary to bring the facility of such agency or organization into compliance with health and safety requirements referred to in .section 9858c(c)(2)(I) of this title
